use_cases: Displaying freelancer or service provider profiles with ratings, duration, and hourly rates
Showing team member cards with skills, tools, and availability information
Creating marketplace seller profiles with bookmark and contact functionality
Building portfolio cards for creators and developers on showcase pages
Generating profile cards for job boards and HR platforms
ai_summary: A React card component for displaying freelancer or service provider profiles with animated entrance effects using Framer Motion, hover interactions with scale effects, rating display with stars, tool/skills badges, and call-to-action buttons. Includes bookmark functionality and stat items for duration and rate information, making it ideal for marketplaces, team pages, or creator portfolios.
